objectives.text: Mayor... no, I should say Governor now! One hundred and fifty citizens! Our village has grown into a full-fledged city! The skyline is dotted with towers and chimneys, the markets are bustling, and our military stands strong. This is truly remarkable!

options.answer: Governor? I like the sound of that!

result.text: You have earned it! A city of this size requires exceptional leadership, and you have proven yourself time and time again. The city council has commissioned a special reward for this historic milestone!

options.answer: It takes a city to raise a city!

result.text: Well said! Every citizen played their part, but none of this would be possible without your vision. Here, the council insists you accept this!

options.answer: For the city and all who call it home!

objectives.text: A city of one hundred and fifty! Legends will be written about this place. But I sense there is still one more milestone on the horizon...
